4076.title: Timeless Festival by Montreux: InBeat Live
4076.description: Sam Himself shares the stage with concert excerpts of the legends Johnny Cash, Van Morrison and Talk Talk. ⁠⁠They'll skillfully blend folk rock, post-rock, and of course Sam's Fondue Western.⁠⁠

4296.title: Timeless Festival by Montreux: InBeat Live
4296.description: If you love soul, you know Daptone Records - hardly any other label has had such a strong influence on the recent soul revival. ⁠⁠The label founder himself will be on stage with concert excerpts of Sharon Jones, Charles Bradley and the Antibalas.
